title: deparia wilsonii var. wilsonii
intro: Deparia wilsonii var. wilsonii, also known as Wilson's spleenwort, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It is native to China and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Deparia wilsonii var. wilsonii include lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in infusions, decoctions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
